rationale: Fam. Code §153.371 governs rights and duties of a nonparent sole managing conservator. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 153.371. RIGHTS AND DUTIES OF NONPARENT APPOINTED AS SOLE MANAGING CONSERVATOR.
_note: The cited rule concerns family law conservatorship and is wholly unrelated to the proposed property tax exemption change.
